<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtYmVnaW4gZXlKa1lYUmhJam9pWUdCZ2NseHVaR1lrYzNWaWFtVmpkRjl1Y2lBOExTQmhjeTVqYUdGeVlXTjBaWElvWkdZa2MzVmlhbVZqZEY5dWNpbGNibVJtSkhKbGMzQnZibk5sVm05M1pXd2dQQzBnWVhNdVptRmpkRzl5S0dSbUpISmxjM0J2Ym5ObFZtOTNaV3dwWEc1a1ppUnlaWE53YjI1elpVVWdQQzBnWVhNdWJuVnRaWEpwWXloa1ppUnlaWE53YjI1elpVVXBYRzVnWUdBaWZRPT0gLS0+XG5cbmBgYHJcbmRmJHN1YmplY3RfbnIgPC0gYXMuY2hhcmFjdGVyKGRmJHN1YmplY3RfbnIpXG5kZiRyZXNwb25zZVZvd2VsIDwtIGFzLmZhY3RvcihkZiRyZXNwb25zZVZvd2VsKVxuZGYkcmVzcG9uc2VFIDwtIGFzLm51bWVyaWMoZGYkcmVzcG9uc2VFKVxuYGBgXG5cbjwhLS0gcm5iLXNvdXJjZS1lbmQgLS0+XG4ifQ== -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuZGYkc3ViamVjdF9uciA8LSBhcy5jaGFyYWN0ZXIoZGYkc3ViamVjdF9ucilcbmRmJHJlc3BvbnNlVm93ZWwgPC0gYXMuZmFjdG9yKGRmJHJlc3BvbnNlVm93ZWwpXG5kZiRyZXNwb25zZUUgPC0gYXMubnVtZXJpYyhkZiRyZXNwb25zZUUpXG5gYGAifQ== -->

```r
df$subject_nr <- as.character(df$subject_nr)
df$responseVowel <- as.factor(df$responseVowel)
df$responseE <- as.numeric(df$responseE)
Warning: NAs introduced by coercion
df$group <- as.factor(df$group)
df$contStep <- as.numeric(df$contStep)
Warning: NAs introduced by coercion
df$biteblock <- as.factor(df$biteblock)
df<- df %>% mutate(count_radboudbox_response_BB_test = count_radboudbox_response_BB_test + 1, 
                   count_radboudbox_response_NB_test = count_radboudbox_response_NB_test +1) #so that sequence number counting starts from 1 instead of 0

coding in contrast levels

df$biteblock <- relevel(df$biteblock, ref = "N")
df$group <- relevel(df$group, ref = "NB")
#centering the constinuum step to step 4 (the middle step) -> changing this to centering on 3, because data shows that 3 is actually the most confusing step
df$contStep <- df$contStep -3

lmer


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuZHVyaW5nTG1lciA8LSBnbG1lcihyZXNwb25zZUV+IGNvbnRTdGVwICAqZ3JvdXAgKiBiaXRlYmxvY2sgKyAoY29udFN0ZXB8c3ViamVjdF9ucikgKyAoYml0ZWJsb2NrfHN1YmplY3RfbnIpICsgKDF8cGFpciksIGRhdGEgPSBkZiwgZmFtaWx5ID0gYmlub21pYWwpXG5gYGAifQ== -->

```r
duringLmer <- glmer(responseE~ contStep  *group * biteblock + (contStep|subject_nr) + (biteblock|subject_nr) + (1|pair), data = df, family = binomial)
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->
```r
duringLmer <- glmer(responseE~ contStep  *group * biteblock + (contStep|subject_nr) + (biteblock|subject_nr) + (1|pair), data = df, family = binomial)

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiV2FybmluZzogTW9kZWwgZmFpbGVkIHRvIGNvbnZlcmdlIHdpdGggbWF4fGdyYWR8ID0gMC4yNzc1NjMgKHRvbCA9IDAuMDAyLCBjb21wb25lbnQgMSlcblxuPCEtLSBybmItc291cmNlLWJlZ2luIGV5SmtZWFJoSWpvaVlHQmdjbHh1YzNWdGJXRnllU2hrZFhKcGJtZE1iV1Z5S1Z4dVlHQmdJbjA9IC0tPlxuXG5gYGByXG5zdW1tYXJ5KGR1cmluZ0xtZXIpXG5gYGBcblxuPCEtLSBybmItc291cmNlLWVuZCAtLT5cbiJ9 -->

Warning: Model failed to converge with max|grad| = 0.277563 (tol = 0.002, component 1)

summary(duringLmer)

duringLmer <- glmer(responseE~ contStep*group*biteblock + (contStep|subject_nr)+ (1|pair), data = df,family=binomial(link=\logit\),
            control=glmerControl(optimizer=\bobyqa\))
summary(duringLmer)



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtYmVnaW4gZXlKa1lYUmhJam9pWUdCZ2NseHVZR0JnY2x4dVpIVnlhVzVuVEcxbGNpQThMU0JuYkcxbGNpaHlaWE53YjI1elpVVitJR052Ym5SVGRHVndLbWR5YjNWd0ttSnBkR1ZpYkc5amF5QXJJQ2hqYjI1MFUzUmxjSHh6ZFdKcVpXTjBYMjV5S1NzZ0tERjhjR0ZwY2lrc0lHUmhkR0VnUFNCa1ppeG1ZVzFwYkhrOVltbHViMjFwWVd3b2JHbHVhejFjWEd4dloybDBYRndwTEZ4dUlDQWdJQ0FnSUNBZ0lDQWdZMjl1ZEhKdmJEMW5iRzFsY2tOdmJuUnliMndvYjNCMGFXMXBlbVZ5UFZ4Y1ltOWllWEZoWEZ3cEtWeHVjM1Z0YldGeWVTaGtkWEpwYm1kTWJXVnlLVnh1WUdCZ1hHNWdZR0FpZlE9PSAtLT5cblxuYGBgclxuYGBgclxuZHVyaW5nTG1lciA8LSBnbG1lcihyZXNwb25zZUV+IGNvbnRTdGVwKmdyb3VwKmJpdGVibG9jayArIChjb250U3RlcHxzdWJqZWN0X25yKSsgKDF8cGFpciksIGRhdGEgPSBkZixmYW1pbHk9Ymlub21pYWwobGluaz1cXGxvZ2l0XFwpLFxuICAgICAgICAgICAgY29udHJvbD1nbG1lckNvbnRyb2wob3B0aW1pemVyPVxcYm9ieXFhXFwpKVxuc3VtbWFyeShkdXJpbmdMbWVyKVxuYGBgXG5gYGBcblxuPCEtLSBybmItc291cmNlLWVuZCAtLT5cbiJ9 -->

```r
```r
duringLmer <- glmer(responseE~ contStep*group*biteblock + (contStep|subject_nr)+ (1|pair), data = df,family=binomial(link=\logit\),
            control=glmerControl(optimizer=\bobyqa\))
summary(duringLmer)
```
```

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtYmVnaW4gZXlKa1lYUmhJam9pWUdCZ2NseHVaSFZ5YVc1blgyMXZaR1ZzSUR3dElISmxjM0J2Ym5ObFJYNGdZMjl1ZEZOMFpYQXFaM0p2ZFhBcVltbDBaV0pzYjJOcklDc2dLR052Ym5SVGRHVndmSE4xWW1wbFkzUmZibklwSUNzZ0tERjhjR0ZwY2lsY2JtWnBkQ0E4TFNCaWNtMG9aSFZ5YVc1blgyMXZaR1ZzTENCa1lYUmhJRDBnWkdZc0lHWmhiV2xzZVNBOUlHSmxjbTV2ZFd4c2FTZ3BMR052Ym5SeWIyd2dQU0JzYVhOMEtHRmtZWEIwWDJSbGJIUmhJRDBnTUM0NU9Ua3BMQ0JqYUdGcGJuTWdQU0F5TENCcGRHVnlJRDBnTlRBd01Dd2dkMkZ5YlhWd0lEMGdNakF3TUN3Z1kyOXlaWE1nUFNBeUxDQnpaV1ZrSUQwZ01UUXhOeWxjYm1CZ1lDSjkgLS0+XG5cbmBgYHJcbmR1cmluZ19tb2RlbCA8LSByZXNwb25zZUV+IGNvbnRTdGVwKmdyb3VwKmJpdGVibG9jayArIChjb250U3RlcHxzdWJqZWN0X25yKSArICgxfHBhaXIpXG5maXQgPC0gYnJtKGR1cmluZ19tb2RlbCwgZGF0YSA9IGRmLCBmYW1pbHkgPSBiZXJub3VsbGkoKSxjb250cm9sID0gbGlzdChhZGFwdF9kZWx0YSA9IDAuOTk5KSwgY2hhaW5zID0gMiwgaXRlciA9IDUwMDAsIHdhcm11cCA9IDIwMDAsIGNvcmVzID0gMiwgc2VlZCA9IDE0MTcpXG5gYGBcblxuPCEtLSBybmItc291cmNlLWVuZCAtLT5cbiJ9 -->

during_model <- responseE~ contStep*group*biteblock + (contStep|subject_nr) + (1|pair)
fit <- brm(during_model, data = df, family = bernoulli(),control = list(adapt_delta = 0.999), chains = 2, iter = 5000, warmup = 2000, cores = 2, seed = 1417)



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

```r
```r
during_model <- responseE~ contStep*group*biteblock + (contStep|subject_nr) + (1|pair)
fit <- brm(during_model, data = df, family = bernoulli(),control = list(adapt_delta = 0.999), chains = 2, iter = 5000, warmup = 2000, cores = 2, seed = 1417)
```
```

```
                prior     class                        coef      group resp dpar nlpar lb ub       source
               (flat)         b                                                                   default
               (flat)         b                  biteblockY                                  (vectorized)
               (flat)         b                    contStep                                  (vectorized)
               (flat)         b         contStep:biteblockY                                  (vectorized)
               (flat)         b            contStep:groupBN                                  (vectorized)
               (flat)         b contStep:groupBN:biteblockY                                  (vectorized)
               (flat)         b                     groupBN                                  (vectorized)
               (flat)         b          groupBN:biteblockY                                  (vectorized)
 student_t(3, 0, 2.5) Intercept                                                                   default
 lkj_corr_cholesky(1)         L                                                                   default
 lkj_corr_cholesky(1)         L                             subject_nr                       (vectorized)
 student_t(3, 0, 2.5)        sd                                                         0         default
 student_t(3, 0, 2.5)        sd                                   pair                  0    (vectorized)
 student_t(3, 0, 2.5)        sd                   Intercept       pair                  0    (vectorized)
 student_t(3, 0, 2.5)        sd                             subject_nr                  0    (vectorized)
 student_t(3, 0, 2.5)        sd                    contStep subject_nr                  0    (vectorized)
 student_t(3, 0, 2.5)        sd                   Intercept subject_nr                  0    (vectorized)
```



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->

 exp(-0.53) = 0.588605 : bbY makes the odds of choosing E 0.59 times greater per step than bbN
 
0.588 times greater is difficult to interpret, thus: exp(0.53) = 1.698932: bbN makes the odds of choosing E 1.70 times *smaller* per step than bbN

"The positive effect of trial progression (contStep) on the outcome was significantly attenuated in the bite block condition, as indicated by a negative interaction (β = −0.53, 95% CrI [−0.84, −0.23]). Although the effect of contStep remained positive, its magnitude was substantially reduced when a bite block was present."

The slope for the BB condition is flatter (more uniform? Check single steps? How?)

Plot trace and density:


<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->

```r
bayes_R2(fit)

changing priors

fit2 <- brm(during_model, data = df, 
            prior = priors,
            family = bernoulli(),control = list(adapt_delta = 0.99), chains = 2, iter = 5000, warmup = 2000, cores = 2, seed = 1417)

summary(fit2)
 Family: bernoulli 
  Links: mu = logit 
Formula: responseE ~ contStep * group * biteblock + (contStep | subject_nr) + (1 | pair) 
   Data: df (Number of observations: 924)

         total post-warmup draws = 6000

and Tail_ESS are effective sample size measures, and Rhat is the potential
scale reduction factor on split chains (at convergence, Rhat = 1).

plots


<!-- rnb-plot-begin eyJoZWlnaHQiOjQzMi42MzI5LCJ3aWR0aCI6NzAwLCJzaXplX2JlaGF2aW9yIjowLCJjb25kaXRpb25zIjpbXX0= -->

the most confusing step seems to be -1 (which is step 3, recenter the data and rerun the model)
